## QualityLevelsPluginSettings.preferredCodecPrefix property

Force a specific codec prefix (e.g. `'av01'`<!-- -->, `'hvc1'`<!-- -->, `'avc1'`<!-- -->) for HLS or DASH streams, bypassing the automatic codec detection. Takes precedence over .

Useful for letting the user manually switch codec tiers at runtime by reloading the player with the desired prefix.

**Signature:**

```typescript
preferredCodecPrefix?: string;
```
